headline: Huntington Bancshares Faces Shifting M&A Outlook And Valuation Discount
summary: Capstone Partners, a subsidiary of Huntington Bancshares (NasdaqGS:HBAN), reports that middle market M&A conditions are moving toward normalization after disruption in 2024. The firm cites renewed confidence among buyers and sellers, with valuation gaps easing and deal activity expected to re accelerate through 2026. This update highlights a potential shift in the M&A environment that could influence Huntington Bancshares' advisory revenues and broader financial services activity. For you...
